## Source: ossf-package-analysis (313f573490a41070ababd4ac29e426b2b2d8f55dad52ab7068111a56bf582faf)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-modelsgateway-access' @ 1.4.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
